name: ConfirmDialog
description: A confirmation dialog component with status icons, customizable buttons, and action handlers for user confirmations.
usage_guidelines: Use for actions requiring user confirmation (delete, submit, etc.).
Choose appropriate type (info, success, warning, danger) for action severity.
Provide clear title and description of the action.
Customize button text to match the action (e.g., 'Delete', 'Confirm').

type.description: Dialog type with corresponding icon and color.

onCancel.description: Callback fired when cancel button is clicked.

onConfirm.description: Callback fired when confirm button is clicked.

styling_info.visual_description: A dialog with status icon (info, success, warning, danger), title, message content, and action buttons in footer. Icon color matches dialog type.

Do: Use for destructive or important actions
Choose appropriate type for action severity
Use danger type for destructive actions
Dont: Don't use vague button text like 'OK'
Don't forget to close dialog after action

Example.title: Example
